# Onett building / interior NPC inventory

Generated from world.json (bounded sector-areas reached by doors). Worklist for populating every building with an NPC + mapping shopkeepers. Coordinates are interior-landing world pixels; add overlay NPCs (content/added-npcs.json) where empty.

Totals: 661 bounded interiors | 512 populated | 149 EMPTY | 15 no-talkable.
